text:
Once upon a time in the heart of a giant forest, there lived a magical golden apple tree that bloomed vibrant blossoms every spring. This tree produced apples that weren't just any apples; they were said to grant any wish. Sooner or later, all the woodland beings wanted an apple. The cats wanted an easy chair to cuddle upon. The squirrels desired fast food transportation.

Our clever squirrel, Rosie, got tired of hearing the same wishes. She decided to use her wit. One morning while the golden apples drifted down like golden leaves, Rosie tucked them into a hollowed-out oak stump. She then filled a basket with some maple syrup and nuts. Every evening after sunset, she sat by the stump reading stories aloud.

The squirrels fell asleep listening to Rosie read from children’s classics, folklore, and sometimes tall tales. They woke up feeling fulfilled. Occasionally they would request a nice meal of roasted owl...but Rosie knew how to say no.

Fast forward a few months
